text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Oh, is my bow crooked?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nope, it's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Silence Suzuka and her friends in the dance
studio. They're doing a dress rehearsal for the
celebration concert.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, should we make sure we can do all our
dance moves properly in these outfits?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. Let's rehearse "Never Looking Back."
I'll go call the backup dancers!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was so much fun! Everyone's moves were
really cool!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It was like a sea of blue in the mirror...
And when we danced we looked like rolling waves
of blue and white.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It made my heart beat so fast. That's how
the audience is going to see us, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We better make sure our singing is on par with
our dance skills!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Is that really enough though?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This celebration concert is different from winning
concerts, right? It's a super special event...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it's like someone once said, "A show is
incomplete until the audience is involved." It'll
probably be kinda like that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I think I get it. The real thing will feel
completely different from practice.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so how about we try to imagine what it's
going to be like during the actual show?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then we can sing our hearts out, like it's the real
deal!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Visualization training! I think that's a wonderful
idea. Let's try it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the concert, and we're waiting just
off stage... I think the opening announcement
could be any second now...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there's the announcement! Oooh... Gosh, I'm
so nervous...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Finally, the music's turned down. Listen, the
whole venue's practically silent.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: There's the opening movie playing... And it's over.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's time for the concert! Let's hit the stage!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We stand onstage and before us is... a sea of
lights, a rainbow of colors.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the audience clapping for us... Oh my
gosh, I'm getting goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Within the sea of lights is the crowd... It's an
incredible sight. Seeing that scenery, I feel a
power welling up inside me, as if I could soar up
into the air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I feel like I can sing until the end of time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was all in our imagination, so I'm not sure
how the crowd looked... but I hope they smile
during the real show.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, we're gonna put smiles on all their faces!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I hope we put on a performance even
more wonderful than we can imagine.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, once more from the top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The singers practice with all their passion. The
celebration concert is set to be as fiery and
intense as the summer sun itself!
